emails.theme: Mushroom Pantry Stuffer: Seven Varieties, One Jar-Packed Pantry
emails.product: Mushroom Pantry Stuffer (7 Varieties, Quart Size)
emails.shortDescription: Product spotlight on the Mushroom Pantry Stuffer (7 one-quart jars: Maitake, Shiitake, Oyster, Royal Trumpet, Champignon, Portabella, Lion's Mane). No blog promo, product is the whole focus. Meet-the-7-varieties grid, jar trio, shelf-stable benefits.
emails.notes: Client brief Jul 1: focus entirely on the product, do NOT promote the blog. Linked post did not arrive in Slack; built from product page. No invented price.
emails.creativeDirection: HHF green/cream palette. Hero (all 7 jars) + 2-col 7-variety grid + jar trio + shelf-stable benefits checklist. Unique layout vs Jun 30 bell peppers jug spotlight.

emails.theme: Celebrating 250 Years of Independence: Our Most Loved
emails.product: Best sellers: Dried Vegetable Soup, Vegetable Sampler (15 zip), Backpacking Kit (18 zip), Deluxe Sampler (32 zip), Organic Vegetable Pantry Stuffer, Deluxe Fruit Assortment
emails.shortDescription: 4th of July / 250th anniversary email featuring the most loved best sellers (6 products) for celebrations and pantry stocking. Patriotic hero, HHF green product CTAs, 2-col grid each with Shop Now.
emails.notes: Client brief Jul 1. 250 years of American independence theme. Organic Pantry Stuffer described as USDA Certified Organic. Hero CTA -> /collections/best-sellers. No invented price.
emails.creativeDirection: Patriotic (navy #3C3B6E / red #B22234 / cream), red-white-blue stripe, 6-product best-seller grid with individual Shop Now, independence stocking band. Distinct from Jul 2 mushroom spotlight.

emails.theme: Fire Up the Grill: Summer BBQ, Mocktails, 15% Off
emails.product: Sale (15% off): Fireside Favorites (33 zip), Beach House Essentials (23 ct), Deluxe Sampler (32 zip)
emails.shortDescription: Weekly blog + sale email. Deep links the Fire Up the Grill summer BBQ/mocktails blog with 2 featured recipes (Ultimate Veggie Burger, Tropical Sparkler), then a 15% off sale on 3 kits. Layout mirrors client-attached reference templates (hero, editorial feature, 2-col product cards + Shop Now, why-Harmony-House benefit section, footer nav). Client brief Jul 3.
emails.notes: All 3 products verified in stock (via .js) 2026-07-03. Compare-at not set in feed yet; cards show live price note via 15% OFF badge + banner offer. Confirm strikethrough originals or discount code.
emails.creativeDirection: Mirror attached reference layout; HHF green/cream palette; blog feature + 2 recipes + read-post CTA; 2-col sale cards with 15% OFF badge; why-Harmony-House trust labels; footer nav

emails.theme: Soak Up Summer Adventures With Fruit Medleys (Blog + 15% Sale)
emails.product: Sale (15% off): Berry Medley (4 jars qt), Tropical Fruit Medley (4 jars qt), Orchard Fruit Medley (4 jars qt), Deluxe Sampler (32 zip), Beach House Essentials (23 ct), Fireside Favorites (33 zip)
emails.shortDescription: Weekly blog + sale email built on the fruit medleys summer-adventures blog. Products first: 3 fruit medleys (Berry/Tropical/Orchard, four quart jars each) then 3 best-selling kits (Deluxe Sampler, Beach House Essentials, Fireside Favorites), every price a strikethrough markdown at 15% off. Alternating large standalone cards, each with own Shop Now. Blog section teases first two medleys (Berry, Tropical) with usage ideas + stock photos, then a single Read the Blog CTA deep-linked to the exact post. Sale banner + hero both carry Shop the Sale -> /collections/on-sale.
emails.notes: Client brief Jul 13 (Slack): blog https://harmonyhousefoods.com/blogs/news/soak-up-summer-adventures-with-fruit-medleys + 6 sale items. All 6 product pages + images verified 200; prices from live Shopify (=15% off, regular = price/0.85): Berry/Tropical/Orchard $76.46 reg $89.95; Deluxe Sampler $93.46 reg $109.95; Beach House Essentials $195.46 reg $229.95; Fireside Favorites $110.46 reg $129.95. NONE are USDA Certified Organic, so that phrasing intentionally omitted. Blog teases first two medleys only, per feedback #23. Designer image folder: outputs/july-2026/2026-07-15-images (6 product + hero + 2 blog stock). Copy-ready Jul 13.
emails.creativeDirection: HHF green #3d7a44/#2F5E36, gold #C9A24B, cream #F3E7C6/#F5F0E8. Sale banner + hero image (Shop the Sale). Products first: alternating full-width cards (image side swaps), strikethrough->15%-off price + Save 15% chip + own Shop Now. Green kits band. Blog section = 2 medley usage teasers with stock photos + single Read the Blog CTA. Closing 15% strip + footer nav. Distinct alternating-card layout vs Jul 8 grid.

emails.shortDescription: Weekly Blog + Sale email. Blog link and sale products to be provided by client.
